[axiom](../../README.md) / [index](../README.md) / RedactionPolicy

# Variable: RedactionPolicy

> `const` **RedactionPolicy**: `object`

## Type Declaration

### AxiomDefault

> `readonly` **AxiomDefault**: `object`

Includes message content on chat spans, and mirrors tool
payload on tool spans for more convenient querying.

#### AxiomDefault.captureMessageContent

> `readonly` **captureMessageContent**: `"full"` = `'full'`

#### AxiomDefault.mirrorToolPayloadOnToolSpan

> `readonly` **mirrorToolPayloadOnToolSpan**: `true` = `true`

### OpenTelemetryDefault

> `readonly` **OpenTelemetryDefault**: `object`

Redacts message content on chat spans, and does not put
tool payload on tool spans.

#### OpenTelemetryDefault.captureMessageContent

> `readonly` **captureMessageContent**: `"off"` = `'off'`

#### OpenTelemetryDefault.mirrorToolPayloadOnToolSpan

> `readonly` **mirrorToolPayloadOnToolSpan**: `false` = `false`
